transcript.text:
[Geumnam Market]
[It's in an alley...]
[They have their own secret...]
[Seoul-style cold noodles seasoned with powder only]
We're the first powdered-seasoned cold noodle restaurant
[Let's eat]
[It looks scrumptious]
[Amazing]
[Trying out the spicy one]
[And the result...]
[Doomed]
[A mukbang that will bring you into tears]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Geumnam Market today
I heard there's a really good Naengmyun (cold noodle) restaurant located in an alley
It's been here for almost 60 years I've actually had it before and it was very unique

The name is Golmok (Alley) Naengmyun
Let's go
Welcome
-Welcome back -About 3 years ago?
[She was here in 2019 for a TV show]
[And the owner welcomes her]
-3 years? -Yes
Time flies
[Let's see...] Do you remember me?
I was sitting here 3 years ago
[He was here too?!]
[HE WAS!]
It was meant to be
She was eatings o fast
I've been a regular for 60 years And we're also good friends
How much was it for a bowl?

30 Won?!
I want to go back in time
[The menu]
1 naengmyun, 1 seasoned naengmyun, 1 spicy naengmyun,
steamed dumplings, something warm?
rice cake soup, and pork slices
[You still eat a lot...]
[Naengmyun (cold noodles with broth)]
[Steamed dumplings]
[Rice cake soup]
[Pork slices]
[Your meal is here]
Is this the spicy one?
That's regular
Thank you
Incredible

I'll tell my daughter to start watching your videos
1 bowl of rice cake soup gets me full
Beautiful...
-Enjoy your meal~ -Thank you
Are you filming this too?
[Bromance?]
[Out of nowhere?]
[Distancing now...]
[He's going home now...]
This restaurant has been here for almost 60 years
I've been here before for a TV program
I still remember that they make their broth in a very special way
I enjoyed it
Bon appetit
This one first
These usually come with cucumbers, but I can't eat those So I asked not to include them

This is going to be great
These are the good type of noodles
Let's cut it once In half
Perfect
Yes, this is it!
The base of the broth is different than other cold noodles
Seafood, anchovy,
Don't tell them our secret!
Can you say that on camera?
It's definitely different because other places use beef broth
This tastes very special because they use seafood
Refreshing
Sweet, sour, and refreshing
Noodle slurp
Pork slices
The broth tastes really unique and delicious

These are best when served cold
[Oh you know what's up...]
The soup is excellent
There were so many people when I was here last time during the Summer
Lunch time too
The place was packed
[Where did this go?]
Mandu (dumpling)
[With soy sauce]
A lot of people like the dumplings
That tastes good Let's cut that in half
This is so good These are handmade, right?
-Right -It's so good!
The fillings are very soft with thin layers
Right, this was good last time too!
Rice cake soup! Looks good, it has a lot of rice cakes

I scoop about this much for a New Years' meal
This is a lot of food
This soup is good too
Put the dumplings in here and it's a dumpling soup
Very thin and delicious
It's hard to eat if it's too cold and you start shivering
This is cool just about right
It's cold and very refreshing
With some kimchi
Rice cake soup is great here too
I'm going to eat the spicy one last
Let's cut it
This one too
I remember now
The seasoned one was unique too
It wasn't like seasoning paste It was more like powder and flakes

We used 7 different ingredients to make that seasoning
All of the seasonings are made by hand
[That's why it's so good]
Is it okay if you tell us your secret recipe?
I don't tell anyone else Just because it's Tzuyang
-My subscribers will know now -That's fine
That's very savory
The broth is a one of a kind
Even the seasoning here
Very nutty from the blended sesame seeds
Really nutty
The initial taste and scent spread in your mouth with nutty flavors
And then comes the sweet & sour flavors
Egg
[Watching her eat]
This is great

With seasoned noodles
I need to try the spicy one now
[How spicy will this be...?]
This is the spicy one
I'm a bit worried
I wonder how spicy
Some soup first
It just comes and goes away
Cheongyang chili pepper powder
[Oops]
[Telling us all their secrets]
Stop now
[Swipe to lock]
The secret ingredients are in the air
Staying thin after eating like that...
Is there a secret to that?

The spiciness hits you right away and then it goes away
And then lingers for a little bit
I will start sweating if I finish this whole bowl
That's really spicy!
I'm okay with eating Capsaicin,
but weak to chili peppers
This is no joke...
One bite of seasoned noodles first
[Hurry hurry]
[Is it okay now?]
[Not at all]
[Rice cake therapy...]
The right side of my tongue hurts
I streamed from home for about 6 months when I first started mukbang
This place is my very first TV broadcast mukbang restaurant
This was about 3 years ago and it's very meaningful

This place has always been on my mind because I remember that the food was very delicious
So I've been wanting to come back
You've gotten prettier
You as well
[Compliment party]
A lot of people said that her skin was really nice
It's because of our Naengmyun noodles
I always crave it if I spend a day without Naengmyun
Is that why you married him?
[Wrong!]
Now for the spicy one
That Cheongyang chili pepper spiciness spreads all around my mouth
Cleared at once
It's fine eating just the noodles
[Well...?]
It was spicy because of the soup

Eating just the noodles was fine It just gives a good spicy feeling
It just says "spicy" right next to it
So I thought it was "just spicy"
But it's not
It's just written so simply as if it's not that spicy
Some rice cake soup
Spicy!
I just noticed it
They have warm beef broth
How did I just notice it?
I should've had it earlier It's so good
The spiciness went away
I want to take it home
Mandu!
There's only 1 mandu left
I really want some more

This warm broth really hits the spot after you eat a bowl of cold noodles
Seoul-style naengmyun?
I take pride in that
We're the very first place to make powder-seasoned naengmyun
People had our seasoned naengmyun, and then they started to make the seasoned naengmyun of today
There's a Seoul-style naengmyun
Dip the cold mandu in the warm beef broth
[Mix mix]
That was great
[Let's take a photo]
[Leaving with good memories]
Thanks everyone~
I found a relic
My autograph from 3 years ago
My signature used to look so ugly back then
Bro, Tzuyang finished the whole meal

-You should've been here to witness it -I know right?
Hello?
Tzuyang!
-My daughter is scolding me because I didn't get an autograph -I'll leave 1 here for you
-Sorry I couldn't stay to watch you eat -That's okay!
[I left 1 here just for you, sir!] [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
